title: fagelia tetragona
intro: Fagelia tetragona, also known as the yellow birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Fagelia tetragona include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat digestive issues. Fagelia tetragona can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in salves and creams for topical applications.
